## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `hotfix` — critical production fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / config
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests

## Checklist

- [ ] CI gates pass (check the Actions tab)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Follows branch naming convention (`type/ISSUE-ID-description`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `workspace_id` scoping maintained on all new DB queries
- [ ] Biometric re-auth gate present on any new file endpoint
- [ ] Zero-gallery path used (DocumentDirectoryPath, never CameraRoll)
- [ ] README updated if behaviour changed
